title: Pet Loss Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Pet Loss Support Groups 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DOVELEWIS VETERINARY EMERGENCY & SPECIALTY HOSPITAL PET LOSS SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person and virtual pet loss support group meetings. Provides an annual Service of Remembrance event where pet owners gather to memorialize and honor their pets who have passed. 1945 NW Pettygrove Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals and families who are grieving or anticipating the passing of a pet Hours: Varies Email (503) 228-7281 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides grief support in a group setting. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st and 3rd Thursdays of the month 6pm-7:30pm Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE GRIEF TRAVELERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing 4 week series for 6-10 participants with weekly 60 minute group sessions. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING UNDONE INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling sessions. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE GRIEF HOUSE GRIEF SUPPORT GATHERINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person and virtual community-led grief support events for different types of loss including the death of a loved one, job loss, pet loss, divorce or estrangement, and other life changes. 7906 N Fessenden Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older who are experiencing grief Hours: Hours vary by event Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOVELEWIS VETERINARY EMERGENCY & SPECIALTY HOSPITAL PET LOSS SUPPORT PROGRAM LIVING UNDONE OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES THE GRIEF HOUSE GRIEF SUPPORT GATHERINGS
